name: Double Chocolate Muffins
recipeIngredient: 3 oz unsweetened chocolate, chopped into squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F. In a 2-quart glass bowl, combine butter and unsweetened chocolate. Heat in microwave oven on High for 2 to 2.5 minutes, until melted and smooth when stirred. Let cool to lukewarm.
2. Stir in sugar, egg, vanilla, salt, and buttermilk until thoroughly blended. Mix together flour and baking soda and stir into chocolate mixture just until combined. Stir in chocolate chips.
3. Spoon batter into 12 paper-lined muffin cups, filling each cup to the top.
4. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Let muffins cool in pans for 5 minutes, then transfer to racks to cool completely. Serve warm or cool.
